utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified with all details expected by its label: 
- property: includes name, address, bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, features, price — sufficiently detailed and includes price; covered.
- financing: provides type, interest rate, down payment %, down payment amount, loan amount, estimated monthly payment, arrangement fee, and terms style (variable) — sufficiently detailed; covered.
- legal_services: provides service description and cost — covered.
- moving_services: provides service description and cost — covered.
- setup_services: provides initial setup fees and estimated monthly utilities breakdown including total — covered.
- total_budget: provides total initial outlay and total estimated property cost with descriptions — covered. All 6 items are present and reasonably fully specified.
